name: ttrpg-helper-mcp
description: MCP App server for Fallout TTRPG: animated 2d20 dice roller and character sheet UI resources.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=dice-roll.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=character-sheet.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=wrm-dice.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=wrm-dice-3d.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=wrm-sheet.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && bun build server.ts --outdir dist --target node && bun build main.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --external "./server.js" --banner "#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build 1>&2 && npm run serve:stdio
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch:dice" "npm run watch:sheet" "npm run watch:wrm-dice" "npm run watch:wrm-dice-3d" "npm run watch:wrm-sheet" "npm run serve"
scripts.pack: npm run build && rm -rf node_modules && npm install --omit=dev --omit=optional && npx --yes @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack . ttrpg-helper-mcp.mcpb; npm install
